Name: Average time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Closed across all process variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time required to transition from Completed + In Call to Completed + Closed in variants where Completed + In Call immediately precedes Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average cycle time of Completed + Closed when the case includes a Completed + In Call activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Closed' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time from the start of the case to Completed + Closed in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Closed' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time between Completed + Resolved and Completed + Closed in cases where Completed + In Call occurs before Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average duration of Completed + Closed when the preceding activity is Completed + In Call versus when it is Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Closed' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Closed in variants that contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + Closed in process executions that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Cycle time of Completed + Closed grouped by product, specifically for cases that include the Completed + In Call activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Closed' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Closed segmented by country of the resource performing Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time between consecutive occurrences of Completed + In Call and Completed + Closed within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time from the first occurrence of Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Closed in variants where Completed + In Call appears only once
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Duration of Completed + Closed when it directly follows Completed + In Call compared to when it follows a waiting activity such as Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Closed' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Closed in high-impact versus low-impact incidents as recorded in the impact column
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
